title: MOLYSLIP - COPASLIP | High Temperature Copper Anti-Seize Grease | Withstands Extreme Temperature (Up To 1100°C) | Protects Against Galling, Seizure Rust and Corrosion | Ideal for Cars/Vehicles | 100g
features: What Is COPASLIP - Anti-seize grease specifically formulated to protect fasteners and other still joints that may need to be disassembled, from seizures, even when under extreme temperature (up to 1100°C), pressure, and corrosion.
What's It Made Of - The semi-synthetic base fluid is reinforced with anti-oxidants, corrosion inhibitors, and ultra-pure copper particles to provide outstanding protection to threads and components.

Where To Use - As COPASLIP minimises variations in frictional interference between threads, it is best used on bolts, fasteners, flanges and other clamped interfaces made from copper, aluminium or other metals.

How To Use - Although some may say to smother the desired area, all you need is a thin layer, 0.1mm thick is suitable for most places. For the best results, surfaces should be clean, dry and free from oil, grease or contamination.

Available Sizes - COPASLIP comes in a variety of packages to best suit your needs, after all, this can be used on cars and bikes, lawnmowers or any other machinery. On our Amazon, you will find our 100g tube, 400ml aerosol.
description: From the manufacturer What Does It Protect From? Seizure from extreme temperature and pressure Galling Rust Corrosion Instructions Should be used as supplied. Ensure surfaces to be treated are clean and dry – free from oil, grease or dirt contamination. Apply a thin even coating by rubbing onto the surface with a lint-free cloth or brush. COPASLIP By MOLYSLIP COPASLIP has been an industry standard for decades. Used all around the world, this high-performance grease is specifically formulated to protect fasteners from seizure-induced by extreme temperature, pressure, and corrosion. A semi-synthetic base fluid, reinforced with anti-oxidants, corrosion inhibitors, and ultra-pure copper particles, all providing outstanding protection to threads and components. KEY FEATURES High-Performance Anti-Seize Grease COPASLIP minimises variations in frictional interference between threads, allowing accurate and consistent assembly. Thus preventing galling and seizure during assembly and dismantling Extreme High Temperature Application COPASLIP excels in extreme temperature applications and is capable of delivering it's characteristically high-performance in temperatures ranging between -40°C up to +1100°C Advanced Corrosion Prevention The COPASLIP semi-synthetic base fluid is reinforced with anti-oxidants, and advanced corrosion inhibitors, thus ensuring unparalleled corrosion prevention.
